data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of blocking entry when the usage allowance is exceeded. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system enforces this limit, as it only describes the expected behavior without demonstrating actual enforcement. Specifically, the use case mentions that the door denies entry after 10 hours, but there is no evidence of a test or API read that confirms this functionality is implemented and working as intended.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system blocks entry when the 10-hour limit is reached.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate entry blocking functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the system denies entry when the member has exceeded their 10-hour weekly limit.
